title: Sales Representative — Vientiane Capital
title_lao: ພະນັກງານຂາຍ — ນະຄອນຫຼວງວຽງຈັນ
summary: Build and maintain MEK’s relationships with retailers across Vientiane Capital. Drive distribution for our 19 partner brands across modern and traditional trade.
responsibilities: Visit assigned route of retail stores on a regular schedule
Take orders, manage in-store displays, monitor competitor activity
Achieve monthly sales and distribution KPIs by brand
Build long-term relationships with shopkeepers and store managers
Submit accurate daily activity reports to your sales supervisor
qualifications: Lao national, age 22+
Diploma or higher in any field; sales or marketing background a plus
1+ year FMCG sales experience preferred (fresh graduates with strong ambition welcome)
Valid Lao driving licence (motorbike or car)
Strong communication in Lao; English an advantage
Honest, hard-working, willing to work outdoors
benefits: Competitive base salary + monthly sales commission
Performance bonuses, fuel and phone allowances
Career growth into supervisor / area manager roles

title: Human Resources Officer
title_lao: ພະນັກງານຊັບພະຍາກອນມະນຸດ
summary: Support recruitment, on-boarding, payroll administration and employee engagement for MEK’s growing team across three branches.
responsibilities: Coordinate recruitment cycles end to end (job posts, screening, interviews, offers)
Maintain employee records, contracts and HR database
Support payroll cycle, leave records and benefits administration
Help organise training, on-boarding and team-engagement activities
Ensure compliance with Lao labour law and internal HR policies
qualifications: Bachelor degree in HR, Business Administration, or related
2+ years of HR experience preferred
Strong written and spoken Lao and English
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
Discreet, organised, professional
benefits: Performance bonus, social security, group insurance

title: Warehouse Supervisor
title_lao: ຫົວໜ້າຄັງສິນຄ້າ
summary: Lead the central warehouse operation: inbound receipts, stock control, picking and outbound dispatch for 550+ active SKUs across 19 brands.
responsibilities: Plan and supervise daily warehouse operations and team of 6–10 staff
Ensure accurate stock control, FIFO and inventory cycle counts
Manage inbound shipments and outbound deliveries to all branches
Maintain warehouse safety, cleanliness and 5S standards
Report KPIs (stock accuracy, dispatch on-time, breakages) to operations head
qualifications: 3+ years warehouse / logistics experience, 1+ year supervisory
Knowledge of FMCG warehouse practices and ERP / inventory systems
Strong leadership and people-management skills
Lao native, English a plus
Forklift licence preferred

title: Merchandiser — Pakse Branch
title_lao: ພະນັກງານຈັດຮ້ານ — ສາຂາປາກເຊ
summary: Make sure MEK’s brands look their best on every shelf in southern Lao PDR. Manage in-store displays, promotions and POSM.
responsibilities: Visit assigned routes of retail stores in Champasak and surrounding provinces
Set up and maintain in-store displays, promotions, POSM
Conduct in-store sampling and brand activations
Capture daily competitive intelligence on shelf, pricing and promo activity
Report to the Pakse branch sales manager
qualifications: Lao national based in or willing to relocate to Pakse
Diploma or higher
Friendly, energetic, well-presented
Valid Lao driving licence
Lao native, basic English a plus
benefits: Career path into senior merchandiser or sales rep roles
